tasks.subject: Task 1: Security Accuracy
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix password min_length mismatch (8→12) in shared-validation-patterns and add PyJWT algorithm whitelist comment in fastapi-add-auth.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md:556`
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md:148-154`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md` has `min_length=12` (not `min_length=8`)
- [ ] `fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` has a comment above `algorithms=[ALGORITHM]` explaining it is a security whitelist

**Verify:** `grep "min_length=12" skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md && grep "whitelist" skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` → one match each

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"min_length=12\" skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md && grep \"whitelist\" skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shared-validation-patterns has min_length=12", "fastapi-add-auth has algorithm whitelist comment"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: better-auth v1.5 + Drizzle rc.1 Accuracy
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Note @better-auth/drizzle as separate package in nextjs-add-auth, and extend Drizzle RC callout in both database skills with rc.1 casing API breaking change.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md:140`
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md:49`
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md:49`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` callout names `@better-auth/drizzle` as a separate package
- [ ] `nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md` RC callout mentions rc.1 casing API change
- [ ] `nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` RC callout mentions rc.1 casing API change

**Verify:** `grep "@better-auth/drizzle" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md && grep "casing" skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` → matches in all three files

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"@better-auth/drizzle\" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md && grep \"casing\" skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nextjs-add-auth names @better-auth/drizzle as separate package", "nextjs-add-database RC callout mentions rc.1 casing change", "nestjs-add-database RC callout mentions rc.1 casing change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: pnpm Native Addon Build Permissions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies config step to nestjs-add-auth so bcrypt's native build isn't silently skipped by pnpm 10.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` (Dependencies section, lines 17–21)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` Dependencies section includes a step to add `"pnpm": { "onlyBuiltDependencies": ["bcrypt"] }` to `package.json` before running `pnpm add`

**Verify:** `grep "onlyBuiltDependencies" skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` → one match

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"onlyBuiltDependencies\" skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nestjs-add-auth Dependencies section includes pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies for bcrypt"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: TypeScript 6 tsconfig Explicit types Field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add explicit "types": [] to the vite-react-scaffold tsconfig so TypeScript 6's changed default doesn't silently drop global type packages.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md:808-814`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` tsconfig includes `"types": []`

**Verify:** `grep '"types"' skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` → at least one match in the tsconfig block

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep '\"types\"' skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["vite-react-scaffold tsconfig includes explicit \"types\": [] field"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Version Bump and CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump plugin version from 2.5.0 to 2.6.0 and record all Round 6 changes in CHANGELOG.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Modify: `CHANGELOG.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `plugin.json` version is "2.6.0"
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has `[2.6.0]` entry dated 2026-05-07

**Verify:** `grep '"version"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\[2.6.0\]' CHANGELOG.md` → both match

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude-plugin/plugin.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep '\"version\"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\\[2.6.0\\]' CHANGELOG.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugin.json version is 2.6.0", "CHANGELOG has [2.6.0] entry dated 2026-05-07"]}
```
